title: Premier Christmas gingerbread man infinity light - led mirror tunnel light - 3D christmas light decoration - 60cm gingerbread – gingerbread man waving - multi coloured indoor christmas lights.
features: Infinity Light Effect, Playful Gingerbread Man Design, Large Size Statement Piece
description: Product description Product information Embrace the enchantment of the holiday season with the mesmerizing Premier 60cm Double-Sided Gingerbread Man Infinity Light. This indoor decoration brings the spirit of the Gingerbread Man to life in a truly unique and captivating way, designed to be viewed from both sides and perfect for illuminating your windows. With a generous 5-meter lead length, this Gingerbread Man Infinity Light is easy to place on any tabletop, mantle, or shelf. This Gingerbread Man Infinity Light is designed exclusively for indoor use, allowing you to infuse your living room, dining area, or any indoor space with the warm, magical glow of the Gingerbread Man. Its double-sided feature makes it a stunning addition to your window displays, spreading holiday cheer to all who pass by. Power source: Mains-powered Suitable for: Indoor use Super Bright Led's Safety Warning Handle with care to avoid injury from sharp edges. Be cautious of potential breakage.
